TTS Voices: Azure Neural TTS (Ava · Andrew)

items.label: Funding
items.value: Self-funded by Erich Zirnhelt, Horsefly BC — non-commercial

production_companies.name: Suno
production_companies.disclosure: Suno generated this show's theme song, Cariboo Signals — the music listeners hear at the top of every episode

production_companies.name: Anthropic
production_companies.disclosure: Anthropic's Claude writes and curates every script on this show

production_companies.name: OpenAI
production_companies.disclosure: OpenAI's ChatGPT generated this show's cover art, and OpenAI TTS voices our hosts on some episodes

production_companies.name: Cohere
production_companies.disclosure: Cohere's embedding and reranking tools power our article deduplication pipeline

production_companies.name: Brave Search
production_companies.disclosure: Brave Search is used to enrich our fact-checking and deep-dive research for each episode

production_companies.name: Open-Meteo
production_companies.disclosure: Open-Meteo provides the weather data used in our episode openings
